pack_purpose: Deterministic narrow follow-up pack for targeted escalation. It defines the crux questions and operational budgets, while source choice may remain model-driven within runtime-enforced tool guardrails.
verification_questions: Does the latest available information materially change the decision, given: A short six-day window means any new macro or crypto shock and the near-resolution Binance cushion can move the estimate materially.?

How decision-relevant is the remaining contract/source-of-truth ambiguity: Rules are explicit, but settlement depends on the exact Binance noon-ET 1-minute close surface rather than a broader benchmark.?
Are the current blockers still material to final judgment: No strong independently verified edge versus market after synthesis.?
Is the main verification gap still decision-material: The main unverified gap is the true probability that a routine 4% downside move or noon-minute microstructure wobble hits before settlement.?

structured_handoff_focus.contract_ambiguity_reason: Rules are explicit, but settlement depends on the exact Binance noon-ET 1-minute close surface rather than a broader benchmark.
structured_handoff_focus.verification_gap_summary: The main unverified gap is the true probability that a routine 4% downside move or noon-minute microstructure wobble hits before settlement.
structured_handoff_focus.best_countercase_summary: A normal crypto pullback or bad-timed intraday dip can still push the exact Binance settlement minute to 72000 or lower despite an otherwise healthy BTC tape.
structured_handoff_focus.main_reason_for_disagreement: Most disagreement is about how much to discount for exact-minute settlement fragility versus the current 4% cushion.
structured_handoff_focus.resolution_mechanics_summary: Yes resolves only if Binance BTC/USDT’s 12:00 ET April 21 one-minute candle final Close is strictly above 72000.
structured_handoff_focus.freshness_driver: A short six-day window means any new macro or crypto shock and the near-resolution Binance cushion can move the estimate materially.
decision_blockers: No strong independently verified edge versus market after synthesis.
Short-horizon BTC volatility can erase the current cushion before the exact settlement minute.
Single-minute Binance-specific settlement creates operational and path dependence near threshold.

supporting_persona_summaries.main_thesis: The market's high Yes price is broadly justified by BTC trading materially above 72,000 on the named settlement venue, though exact-minute settlement makes me slightly less bullish than market.
main_logical_chain: Polymarket prices the 72,000 line around 78-81% Yes.
Direct Binance venue data shows BTC already near 74.85k, about 3.96% above threshold.
Given the short horizon, the market's persistence logic is mostly reasonable.
But exact-minute, single-venue settlement adds enough tail risk to justify a slightly lower estimate than market.
strongest_supports: Binance BTCUSDT spot was 74850.96 at review time, materially above the 72000 threshold.
Recent Binance 1-minute klines also sat above 74700, so the cushion was not a stale single print.
strongest_disconfirmers: A roughly 4% BTC downside move over six days is plausible.
Resolution depends on one exact Binance minute close, so temporary weakness at the wrong moment can flip the outcome.
unresolved_ambiguities: How much downside volatility the market is implicitly pricing over the remaining window.
Whether any near-term catalyst could cause a sudden BTC risk-off move before April 21 noon ET.
supporting_persona_summaries.what_would_change_view: I would move lower if Binance BTCUSDT loses most of the cushion or volatility spikes; I would move higher if BTC holds comfortably above 72,000 with stable venue behavior into settlement.
supporting_persona_summaries.timing_relevance: Settlement is Tuesday April 21, 2026 at 12:00 PM EDT on the Binance BTC/USDT 1-minute close, so current cushion matters but can still be eroded over six days.
supporting_persona_summaries.source_quality_view: High-quality direct venue data plus explicit contract rules made source-of-truth ambiguity low, though evidence independence was only medium.
